programme.title: C_Kkompany_FUM_Stereo_HIN_HD
programme.desc: A comedy film about three friends who start a fictitious company called C Kkompany to extort money from the corrupt people in their neighborhood. However, their plan backfires when the news of their company spreads like wildfire, and they become the talk of the town. The movie showcases the hilarious consequences of their actions and how they try to redeem themselves in front of the public.

programme.title: Hello_Hum_Lallan_Bol_Rahe_Hain_FUM_Stereo_HIN_HD
programme.desc: Lallan, a security guard, loves Saroja, who is supposed to get married to an older man for money. However, while convincing her to change her mind, he finds out another shocking fact about her.

programme.title: Bollywood Diaries
programme.desc: Rohit, Vishnu, and Imli are aspiring actors who come from different backgrounds and dream to make it big in Bollywood. However, each of them must diligently brave both internal and professional struggles to even survive in the coveted industry.

programme.title: Luck
programme.desc: Musa, an underworld kingpin and a firm believer in luck, designs a series of life threatening adventure sports with hefty prize money for people around the world. However, the participants can only survive and win if they are exceptionally lucky.

programme.title: Guddi
programme.desc: Kusum is obsessed with Bollywood movies and is unable to distinguish between the real world and the movie world, to the extent that she refuses to marry anyone besides her idol, Dharmendra.

programme.title: Qayamat
programme.desc: Two close friends turn enemies when one becomes a criminal and the other, an IPS officer. Wronged by his friend, the criminal swears to take revenge once he returns from prison.

programme.title: Chupke Chupke
programme.desc: Mischievous botany professor Parimal Tripathi (Dharmendra) plays a little trick on his brother-in-law Raghav (Om Prakash). Jealous of the high esteem in which his own wife, Sulekha (Amitabh Bachchan), holds the other man, Parimal decides to impersonate Raghav's new driver. Laying the groundwork for a series of hilarious misunderstandings, the disguised professor throws doubt on his wife's fidelity and gets his best buddy, Sukumar (Sharmila Tagore), to help out by impersonating Parimal.

programme.title: Golmaal
programme.desc: Ramprasad works for Bhavani, who discourages his employees from pursuing any hobbies. Things take a hilarious turn when Bhavani catches Ramprasad at a hockey match and he lies about having a twin.

programme.title: 5D
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Mahabali 2
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Adbhut Prem Kahani
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Shoorveer
programme.desc: Siddharth is separated from his family as a child and he grows up hating his father. While his father tries to locate him, he ends up falling in love with Sitara and tries to win her heart.

programme.title: Halla Bol
programme.desc: An aspiring actor from a small town makes his way to the top of the coveted Hindi film industry and attains superstardom. However, his life changes drastically when he becomes the prime witness to a murder but is reluctant to reveal what he has seen.

programme.title: Bhoot
programme.desc: A married couple rents a beautiful, spacious apartment at a ridiculously cheap price only to find out that it is haunted. What follows is a series of eerie and hair-raising supernatural episodes in the house.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Holi Aayee Re
programme.desc: In Goa, conman Kishan, dancer Julie, and schemer Sania get entangled with gangsters and cops in a chaotic web of deceit.

programme.title: Phir Teri Kahani Yaad Ayee
programme.desc: Phir Teri Kahani Yaad Aye (1993) drama: Rahul's love Pooja dies in an asylum fire, leaving him haunted by her memories.

programme.title: Yeh Vada Raha
programme.desc: Singer Sunita's face is disfigured in an accident. After surgery gives her a new face, she returns to find Vikram believes she's dead.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: CBI inspector Shyam Kumar investigates a fake cheque scam, uncovering a web of deceit where no one is who they seem.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Midnight Ride
programme.desc: A house wife just left her cop husband, when she picks up Justin Mckay she'll wish she never did as she's plunged into a nightmare and the grip of a psychotic killer.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Day of Redemption
programme.desc: Small-town retired sheriff Frank Everly finds his life on the skids after his wife Mary is murdered by the ruthless maniac Vincent Pope. When Pope escapes from prison, Everly comes out of retirement to hunt down Mary's killer.

programme.title: Maverick: Manhunt Brazil
programme.desc: Mysterious mercenary Jack Maverick (Emiliano Ruschel) arrives in the small town of Passo Fundo, Brazil, after accepting a lucrative contract to investigate a series of suicides. As Jack mingles with the locals, his investigation takes him to a bar, where singer Natasha (Carla Elgert), pill popper Olivia (Larissa Vereza) and drug dealer Zonta (Marcio Kieling) might prove to be the key to unraveling the mystery. During his investigation, Jack realizes that the suicides have a dangerous new drug in common, and finds out that an international drug dealing cartel has been pulling the strings all along.

programme.title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: Ajay loves Ayesha but her father does not approve of Ajay and decides to marry her off to his business partner's son instead. When Ajay persists, her father hires a goon to kill him.

programme.title: Gulzar Dil (oru Naal Oru Kanavu Tamil) (dub)
programme.desc: It's is a romantic drama about Cheenu, a young man who initially pretends to fall in love with Maya as part of a challenge. However, he eventually falls for her for real, and they must overcome family obstacles to be together.

programme.title: Khuda Kasam The Challenge
programme.desc: CBI officer Neetu Singh is framed for the assassination of a chief minister. She attempts to solve this murder mystery with the help of a man who is sentenced to prison for a crime he never committed.

programme.title: Lajja
programme.desc: The Film follows four women from different backgrounds in India as they unite to fight against misogyny and violence in their society. Forced marriage, domestic abuse, and honor killings are just some of the struggles they face. Through their determination, they discover the strength of the human spirit, inspiring others to join their fight for justice. With a powerful cast and storyline, sheds light on important social issues and the fight for women's rights. Will these women succeed in creating a better future for themselves and future generations?

programme.title: Odiyan

programme.title: Pandav The Punch
programme.desc: Pandav: The Punch (2009) fantasy film: A father searches for his son, only to find he's become an Aghori seeking souls' moksha.

programme.title: Tholi Prema

programme.title: Super Taxi
programme.desc: Shiva purchases a vintage car and realises that it is possessed. Can Shiva unearth the mystery behind it?

programme.title: Always And Forever
programme.desc: After a tragedy reunites Nicole with her childhood friends, they each find themselves in danger, targets of a deranged stalker. Nicole knows this can't be a coincidence. The secrets of their past are coming back to haunt them.

programme.title: The Duplicate
programme.desc: When Jessica asks her twin sister Alessandra for help with a blackmailer she gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Pineville Heist
programme.desc: On a routine walk in the woods, a high schooler stumbles into the aftermath of a bank robbery gone wrong. He soon finds himself locked within the schoolgrounds, desperate to keep himself and his teacher alive as one of the psychotic thieves hunts them down.

programme.title: Prodigy
programme.desc: A mother concerned about her young son's disturbing behavior thinks something supernatural may be affecting him.

programme.title: Terror Of Hallow'S Eve
programme.desc: After a fifteen-year-old is brutally beaten up by High School bullies, his wish for revenge unknowingly unleashes the Terror of Halloween.

programme.title: FANTOMWORKS GOES POSTAL
programme.desc: Ron and Valerie want Dan to restore their 1963 Jeep Willy's Fleetvan, but the problems run deeper than the seams hidden beneath inches of filler. Grady's Z28 breaks down so often that he's never had it out of second gear.

programme.title: SHAKE AND BAKE
programme.desc: John thinks his 1958 Corvette is ‘mostly original' but Dan finds a mismatched assortment of poor-quality parts and bad repairs. Chelsea wants FantomWorks to fix up a rare 1971 Fury for her father, Rikk. The car has previously caught on fire 3 times!

programme.title: FLYING HUMANOID, JERSEY DEVIL, BATSQUATCH
programme.desc: Across America, flying monsters like the Flying Humanoid, Batsquatch, and Jersey Devil terrorize communities, leaving towns gripped with fear.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with Blackstone President Jon Gray he reflects on leading through crises, highlighting the firm's difficult Hilton deal as a lesson in staying calm, backing strong businesses and thinking long-term he also emphasizes the importance of resilience, clear decision-making and maintaining humanity in leadership, especially during tough times.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with Emma Grede, chief executive and co-founder of Good American and founding partner of Skims they discuss leading with radical honesty, hiring flexible talent for different stages of growth and why failure, directness and self-belief are essential to scaling a business she also opens up about stepping into the spotlight and shares her views on work from home, modern leadership and the role of artificial intelligence in retail.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Financier and philanthropist David Rubenstein talks with his peers who are leaders of some of America's biggest companies. (S11 E03)

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Sixth Street's Alan Waxman about taking a stake in the New England Patriots, international growth opportunities in the NBA and why a historic NWSL expansion fee paid off.

programme.desc: Bill & Giuliana Rancic Host Inside Business Today. (S1 E01)

programme.title: 1776 Rare USA Gold
programme.desc: Own the 1776-2026 American 1oz Gold Buffalo featuring a Liberty Bell Privy mark, celebrating 250 years of the USA, and graded PF70UCAM. Struck from .9999 pure gold using the classic Buffalo Nickel design, it's one of the rarest releases this year.

programme.title: 1776 Rare USA Gold

programme.title: 1880's Rare Silver
programme.desc: Add the stunning set of 2 1881 and 1885 Carson City Silver Morgan Dollar in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection. These epic rare silver coins have miniscule mintages of 296,000 and 228,000 respectively.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE in one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Human survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking it's now replaced oil as the most likely cause of global conflict discussing whether technology can help secure humanity's future water needs.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Pain is a fact of life for some, it is excruciating and inescapable but amid the continuing fallout of the opioid crisis, the development of new technologies aims to limit and even eliminate pain.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Soon, another billion people will be online, mostly from developing nations ways new users will embrace this technology to transform their lives its meaning for the rest of the world.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: Alexander Stubb,
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua visits Finland, where the threat from neighboring Russia looms large she speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future. (S1 E01)

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Former U.K. Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in strongmen.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: The anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Netanagri
programme.desc: Netanagri | in this episode, we discuss BJP's big victory in West Bengal and Suvendu Adhikari becoming the new Chief Minister. We also decode the reasons behind Mamata Banerjee's defeat and Sunil Bansal's role in BJP's success.

programme.title: The Lallantop
programme.desc: In today's Lallantop show, Kuldeep discusses the NEET exam cancellation after a paper leak, the CBI investigation ordered by NTA, and the 22.79 lakh affected students. Watch to know which cities were part of the leak network and why transparency remains a big concern.

programme.title: Duniyadari
programme.desc: World eyes are on Donald Trump's historic China visit on May 13, the first by a US President in nine years, as both nations look to reset ties amid ongoing rivalry. Plus, UK PM Keir Starmer refuses to resign despite calls from his own party, and US holds talks with Denmark over Greenland military presence.

programme.title: Kharcha Paani
programme.desc: In this episode of Kharcha Pani, we explain if petrol and diesel prices will rise in India amid the growing West Asia crisis. We cover the government's fuel supply, crude oil stock levels, and PM Modi's appeal to reduce fuel consumption.

programme.title: Social List
programme.desc: In this episode of #SocialList, Ashish and Abhilash discuss PM Modi's appeal to not buy gold and the viral fake news about Indira Gandhi's similar appeal in 1967. The Hindu has officially clarified that the old newspaper claim is false.

programme.title: Sehat
programme.desc: In today's Sehat Show, we cover three essential health topics: top supplements for men, PM Modi's advice on reducing oil intake, and how to cook vegetables without oil. Expert doctors and a clinical nutritionist answer all your questions.

programme.title: The Cinema Show
programme.desc: In today's The Cinema Show, we cover the explosive Prabhas vs Vivek Oberoi action sequence in Spirit, Salman Khan's locked look for SVC63, and a fresh update on Drishyam 3 starring Ajay Devgn. Don't miss out on important cinema updates!

programme.title: Rajdhani
programme.desc: Will Rahul Gandhi repeat Sonia Gandhi's old Kerala mistake? Congress faces a major dilemma over the next Kerala CM, with KC Venugopal, VD Satheesan, and Ramesh Chennithala all in the race. Watch the full analysis of this internal power struggle.

programme.title: Asaan Bhasa Mein
programme.desc: Aasan Bhasha Mein | in this episode, we explain why film stars in South India are worshipped like gods and how cinema shapes politics. From MGR and Jayalalithaa to Rajinikanth, Pawan Kalyan and Vijay, understand the rise of fan culture and political power.

programme.title: Tarikh
programme.desc: This episode of Tarikh dives into Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee's fight against the idea of a “United Bengal” during India's Partition. Watch how his opposition shaped Bengal's future and led to the birth of the Bharatiya Jana Sangh.

programme.title: Sciencekaari
programme.desc: A Hantavirus outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius is raising COVID-era concerns again. This video breaks down what the virus is, how it attacks the body, and whether it could become the next pandemic.

programme.title: Ground Report
programme.desc: NEET UG 2026 has been cancelled after a 'guess paper' leak, confirmed by the NTA on X. With over 22 lakh students affected, watch this video for all the details on the growing credibility crisis.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: J&K CM Omar Abdullah sparks controversy by linking alcohol consumption to religion while defending the Union Territory's liquor policy. He clarifies that liquor shops exist for those whose faith allows drinking, adding that his government does not encourage alcohol use.

programme.title: Markandeya Puranam by Vaddiparthi Padmakar
programme.desc: Markandeya Puranam, by Vaddiparthi Padmakar, presents the essence of the ancient Markandeya Purana in a simple and engaging manner. Through the story of Sage Markandeya, the work highlights the values of devotion, righteousness, self-discipline, and faith in divine justice. The book emphasizes moral living and spiritual wisdom, making traditional puranic teachings accessible and meaningful to modern readers.

programme.title: Dharma Sandehalu by TKV Raghavan
programme.desc: Dharma Sandehalu by TKV Raghavan is a thoughtful and insightful show that addresses common doubts and questions related to dharma, life values, and ethical living. Through simple explanations, real-life examples, and spiritual wisdom, the program helps audiences understand how dharma applies to everyday situations. The show aims to guide viewers toward clarity, inner peace, and righteous living in a practical and relatable manner.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan is a culinary history show that explores the food of the royals and their erstwhile states. The show takes it's viewers through an amazing journey of anecdotes, folktales, architecture, art, history and landscape and delves into the unique customs and traditions of the various provinces. All these culminate into beautiful renditions of the recipes unique to those regions. This new season of Raja Rasoi aur Anya Kahaniyaan focuses on the royal families as protagonists and explores their personal stories and journeys that shaped their present day food practices.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.desc: We see by observing many animals that man is not the inventor but the discoverer of different artifacts or techniques. We investigate the use and manufacture of cables, turnbuckles, ropes and anything that can be can be used as an element to tie, hang from or as a lasso.

programme.title: Wild LATAM

programme.title: WS Viral Wild
programme.desc: Far from the reaches of human society, the animal kingdom thrives.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Adventurer George Kourounis joins Mark and Jaclyn on a journey to Nepal. They witness the devastation caused by the deadly 2015 earthquake, see first-hand the reconstruction efforts, and are awed by the warmth and hospitality of the Nepalese people.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is Wild Water our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. Deep in the earth, only 300 feet from a pocket of molten magma, is an amazing chamber filled with giant blue and pink crystals some as big as 60 feet long! It is an extraordinary find and one that is very difficult to witness, as temperatures run to 150 F, with 100% humidity. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews Angry Planet plans to be one of the first in!

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahus North Shore, and filming George surfing with the Hawaian Fire firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo, site of major Tsunami damage in both 1946 and 1964. We also have filmed extensively at Kilawea Volcano, filming the amazing sight of rivers and waterfalls of red hot lava flowing into the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Heres the deal: Mt.Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Heres the first kicker:High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave a cave created by the most unique form of erosion Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with thir tusks in order to eat the salty rock.Heres the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus the worlds most deadly virus.So heres the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Bogi finds an M-3 BMW she wants to buy for herself the AGG Team will need to rebuild the brakes, bleed the clutch, install a new radiator and rework the front-end with new headlights.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: Animals use communication to attract mates, warn off predators, defend territory, or trick their prey. And of course, it's the senses that play the key role - Sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing - all are employed to send signals to others…in the hope actions speak louder than words. In this episode of Animal Super Senses, we find out more about the sensory powers used by animals to make messages loud and clear.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been called upon to handle the delicate matter of moving an adult ragged tooth shark from one aquarium to another.

programme.title: Animal Armory

programme.title: Eaten Alive – Human Hands vs. Piranha!
programme.desc: How does it feel to be bitten by piranhas? Coyote tests this freshwater legend with his own hands—and the results are intense.Slow motion never looked this painful. Coyote's hand meets a snapping turtle's jaw in a frame-by-frame breakdown of force and reaction.

programme.title: Poison Ivy Smoothie – Big Mistake!
programme.desc: Coyote blends poison ivy into a smoothie to test a myth. Spoiler: bad idea. This wild episode mixes humor with a powerful message about plant toxicity.Roaches take over—literally. Coyote faces a nightmare infestation right on his head, exploring how these pests behave and thrive in close quarters.

programme.title: Coyote, Lexie, & Skye Compete for Prehistoric Gold!
programme.desc: Coyote and Mario are on the hunt for prehistoric shark teeth the size of your hand! Teaming up with real fossil experts—and world-record-breaking explorer Lexie Limitless—they're diving into the mud to see who can score the biggest megalodon treasure.

programme.title: Stung by the Dragon Flame Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The dragon flame caterpillar may be tiny, but its sting is fiery. Coyote gets up close—and pays the price.Even plants can pack a punch. Coyote explores a Costa Rican bush with stinging leaves that deliver an unexpectedly sharp pain.

programme.title: Deadly Snake Milking Gone Wrong!
programme.desc: Things go south during a venom extraction. Coyote experiences the dangers firsthand in this episode where snake milking takes a scary turn.

programme.title: Stung by a Bullet Ant! (Truth Revealed)
programme.desc: At long last, the bullet ant returns! Mark faces this infamous insect again to reveal updated insights into its sting—and why it's feared globally.Can gloves actually stop a venomous snake bite? Coyote puts bite-proof gear to the test against real fangs.

programme.title: Snapping Turtle vs. Hand: Will It Break?!
programme.desc: Snapping turtles are no joke, but can they actually break bone? Coyote puts his own hand (and nerves) on the line to find out.The stinging nettle may look harmless, but it hides a nasty surprise. Coyote experiences the sting and explains its effects and remedies.

programme.title: Stung by the Gympie Gympie! (World's Most Painful Plant Sting)
programme.desc: Coyote braves the Gympie Gympie, Australia's infamous pain plant. The sting leaves lasting effects and is known to bring grown men to tears.With nothing but his bare hands, Coyote tries catfish noodling—reaching into muddy water for a hidden monster. It's wild, messy, and risky.

programme.title: 5 Deadly Tick Bites You Need to Worry About!
programme.desc: A deep dive into the five most dangerous tick bites—what to look for, how to avoid them, and why they're more threatening than they seem.A fierce jungle standoff unfolds as a jaguar faces off with a caiman. Coyote breaks down the tactics, strength, and outcomes of this epic duel.

programme.title: Giant Fish Caught – Real River Monster!
programme.desc: A massive fish emerges from the river depths! Coyote wrestles this freshwater monster in one of the biggest catches of his career.The cicada killer wasp may look terrifying, but how dangerous is it really? Coyote gets stung to find out and compare it to others on his list.

programme.title: Stung by a Stonefish! (Rare Freshwater Version)
programme.desc: A rare freshwater stonefish delivers one of the most painful stings Mark has ever endured. It's both risky and riveting.The thorny devil lizard is covered in spikes and full of surprises. Mark explores its desert defenses and water-collecting superpowers.

programme.title: 100,000 Endangered Bats vs. Deadly Fungus!
programme.desc: A deadly fungus threatens over 100,000 endangered bats. Coyote investigates the science, symptoms, and species affected by white-nose syndrome.

programme.title: Human Hand vs. Box of Pain!
programme.desc: A mystery box, a painful surprise. Coyote risks his hand in a blind challenge to test different insect stings and bites by touch alone.This armored lizard looks like a living dinosaur. Mark handles its powerful bite and explores the evolution of its protective scales.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz
programme.sub-title: How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: Motor Valley 2022 inauguration

programme.title: Digitalized lighting technologies in the Audi A8
programme.desc: Light technology is steadily creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization raises the customer experience to a whole new level.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation
programme.desc: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: Volvo Cars and Epic Games bring real-time photorealistic visualisation
programme.desc: To offer its customers the best possible user experience, Volvo Cars is bringing photorealistic visualisation technology into its next generation of electric cars through a new collaboration with Epic Games. The companies are teaming up to bring Epic's Unreal Engine game engine into upcoming Volvo cars, providing unparalleled high-quality graphics inside the cabin. Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment and software company probably best known for Fortnite, one of the world's largest games. Epic Games also develops Unreal Engine, widely considered to be the most advanced real-time 3D creation tool used in various industries beyond games, and which will now be used by Volvo Cars for developing digital interfaces inside its cars and rendering real-time graphics in the car.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT Sensors S-Class
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.desc: I walk through everything I plan to do for the exterior, and basically start the demolition process.

programme.title: Clean My Laundry Room With Me
programme.desc: It's spring cleaning time! I'm giving the laundry room a much-needed makeover to improve the organization.

programme.title: From a Hole in the Wall to a Miniature House
programme.desc: I transform a hole in the wall into a miniature house!

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason experiences insecurity about challenges that the couple are, quite literally, dropped into. From falling out of the sky to a rappel into a dark cave, will the couple be able to work together or will they end up stranded in the dark?

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: This time, Mike's planned 48 hours in New Mexico... And he's determined to show the guys as much of it as possible!! From the White Sands National Park, to Hatch, Santa Fe, Albuquerque and Taos! How do you think he'll get on??!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!

programme.title: USA Through the Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Place is inextricably linked to who we are as human beings. See the American Great Outdoors in its purest and most authentic light – through the eyes of locals.

programme.title: USA Through Food
programme.desc: A journey through the USA, through the diverse food scenes of six vibrant cities.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Dylan discovers Kennett Square, Pennsylvania, a vibrant town producing over 70% of America's mushrooms.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: If there's one thing that the town of Abbeville can teach you, it's that you can't make a good Cajun omelet without breaking a 'few' eggs - over 5,000 of them.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Dylan explores the world of Hatch chilis and meets the farmers and community in this New Mexico valley known for bringing these unique peppers to life - one tingly, tasty, spicy bite at a time.

programme.title: Roadfood Adventures USA
programme.desc: Travel along the West to some of the most colorful roads, delicious food, magnificent scenery, magic moments, and fascinating people all along the way.

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America's most legendary outdoor playgrounds.
